name: GOP Presidential
subject: Our gift to you
body:
| | |
---
| |
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzI3LTE5OWU3NjEwZTkzNjQwNTk5MTRhY2MzYzM3NzE4MTQx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2luZm8uaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb25zdGl0dXRpb25fMTAxX2Vucm9sbD91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfR09QMzExMjImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbjEwMQ&K=QpaOzVuTnQoOd6-_3uAr3w)
---
| | | Fellow American, One of the greatest gifts God has given Americans is our freedom. Even with all the turmoil and oppression we see in the world around us, we still too often take these freedoms for granted. In our great country, the Constitution is the document that protects it. After the Bible, it is the single most important document in the world. Most Americans think they know it well, since they learned about it in school. But far too few Americans truly understand the Constitution and the freedoms it protects. **We've made our renowned Constitution 101 course free for all Americans to take online -- the same course that every Hillsdale student must take to graduate, regardless of their major.** [Activate your personal Constitution 101 course today](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzI3LTE5OWU3NjEwZTkzNjQwNTk5MTRhY2MzYzM3NzE4MTQx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2luZm8uaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb25zdGl0dXRpb25fMTAxX2Vucm9sbD91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfR09QMzExMjImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbjEwMQ&K=Ju4hZC3QOmSTBFFROJUpEA) \-- you'll get weekly lessons via email and can take quizzes to test your knowledge as you learn. ** | Time is Running Out [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzI3LTE5OWU3NjEwZTkzNjQwNTk5MTRhY2MzYzM3NzE4MTQx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2luZm8uaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb25zdGl0dXRpb25fMTAxX2Vucm9sbD91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfR09QMzExMjImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbjEwMQ&K=rI1zkIlctS1hI2KRRIj2Tw)

[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzI3LTE5OWU3NjEwZTkzNjQwNTk5MTRhY2MzYzM3NzE4MTQx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2luZm8uaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb25zdGl0dXRpb25fMTAxX2Vucm9sbD91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfR09QMzExMjImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbjEwMQ&K=j--gTGeKRTfVJVU1bIFdyQ)
---|---
Rush Limbaugh and Mark Levin agree: "Hillsdale College is the authority on teaching the Constitution."
In the fight to preserve our freedoms, our greatest enemy is ignorance. Become an expert on the document that secures and preserves your freedom -- the U.S. Constitution.
[Start your free Constitution 101 course today.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzI3LTE5OWU3NjEwZTkzNjQwNTk5MTRhY2MzYzM3NzE4MTQx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2luZm8uaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb25zdGl0dXRpb25fMTAxX2Vucm9sbD91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfR09QMzExMjImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbjEwMQ&K=Qqq5uGxxY6R7BJya2oWzLw)
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzI3LTE5OWU3NjEwZTkzNjQwNTk5MTRhY2MzYzM3NzE4MTQx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2luZm8uaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9jb25zdGl0dXRpb25fMTAxX2Vucm9sbD91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfR09QMzExMjImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbjEwMQ&K=dRgBd256v0k6BqwKKCYiwQ)
Thank you,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: PETITION (via DSCC)
subject: SIGN ON: Denounce Trump's hateful White House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
There's no time to waste. Democrats everywhere must fight Donald Trump's dangerous plans for the White House! With only 13 hours left on the triple match, just look at who's been asking you to help us hit our most critical deadline yet!
---

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: re: Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Governor McCrory is officially filing for a recount. He's doing everything he can to drag this out and cast doubt on this election. We have to continue to fight.
Governor McCrory is officially filing for a recount. He's doing everything he can to drag this out and cast doubt on this election. We have to continue to fight.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b14/2fde7c66/43b841ef/15692a53/1030240897/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccroryrecount?utm_campaign=fnd_recont_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161122_fnd_gq_recont_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, We just got news that Governor McCrory is officially filing for a recount. To be very plain about this, this is nothing but a last-ditch effort to delay and deny the results of this election he already lost. **Governor McCrory and his team are doing everything they can to drag this out and cast doubt on this election. We have to continue to fight. Please chip in now to help out:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b14/2fde7c66/43b841ef/15692a52/1030240897/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccroryrecount?utm_campaign=fnd_recont_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161122_fnd_gq_recont_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

When we woke up this morning, Roy's lead had expanded to 8,569 votes. This number continues to grow as counties finalize their election results.
We are confident that a recount will do nothing to change the fact that Roy Cooper has won this election.
**[I can't tell you how important it is that we fight back with everything we have. We have to protect Roy's win. Chip in here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202b14/2fde7c66/43b841ef/15692a53/1030240897/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-mccroryrecount?utm_campaign=fnd_recont_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161122_fnd_gq_recont_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for your continued support,
Trey Nix
Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Our pick for DNC Chair
body:
We need Keith Ellison as the next Chair of the Democratic National Committee.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
**Here's the truth: if we want to transform the Democratic Party to make it once again responsive to the needs of working people, we need Rep. Keith Ellison to serve as the next Chair of the Democratic National Committee.**
This month's election results proved that the American people are fed up with the establishment. They want change and they want it now. Keith Ellison is ready to revamp the Democratic National Committee by getting big money out of politics, taking on Wall Street and the billionaire class, and realizing the full potential of the grassroots.
Keith is one of the most progressive members of Congress, and currently serves as co-chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. Our Revolution is proud to support Keith as the next Chair of the Democratic National Committee, and we hope you will join us:
[**Show your support by splitting a $3 contribution between Keith Ellison and Our Revolution right now to help us usher in a new era of people-powered politics to the Democratic Party.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ellison-dnc-chair?refcode=em161122-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ellison-dnc-chair?refcode=em161122-full")
The Democratic Party has a decision to make: Will it commit to being the party that advances the needs of working people, or will it continue feeding into the pressures from special interest groups and the billionaire class?
Keith understands that by rejecting the policies of the political establishment and wealthy campaign contributors, we can start to get to work on issues like creating a $15 minimum wage, opposing fracking and the construction of oil pipelines, and passing debt-free college.
We need the Democratic Party to be led by a progressive who will ensure we have an organization and a message that stands up for working families, not Wall Street and big corporations. Keith Ellison has shown he is up for the task.
[**Please split a $3 contribution between Keith Ellison and Our Revolution right now to help revitalize the Democratic Party and demand that it prioritize the needs of the people, not the billionaires.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ellison-dnc-chair?refcode=em161122-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ellison-dnc-chair?refcode=em161122-full")
Keith was one of the only members of Congress who acknowledged very early on in the primary the potential for Trump to win the Republican nomination. With his insight and strong moral compass, he will play a crucial role in leading the fight against Trump, and knows what is at stake for so many who call this country home.
The Democratic National Committee will be key to ensuring Democrats come out strong during the midterms in 2018, and go on to win back the White House in 2020. We believe Keith is the right choice for revitalizing the party and determining which direction it will take in the years ahead.
Thank you for joining us in supporting Keith Ellison as the next Chair of the Democratic National Committee.
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ellison-dnc-chair?refcode=em161122-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ellison-dnc-chair?refcode=em161122-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/").

Keith understands that by rejecting the policies of the political establishment and wealthy campaign contributors, we can start to get to work on issues like creating a $15 minimum wage, opposing fracking and the construction of oil pipelines, and passing debt-free college. We need the Democratic Party to be led by a progressive who will ensure we have an organization and a message that stands up for working families, not Wall Street and big corporations. Keith Ellison has shown he is up for the task. "" Keith was one of the only members of Congress who acknowledged very early on in the primary the potential for Trump to win the Republican nomination. With his insight and strong moral compass, he will play a crucial role in leading the fight against Trump, and knows what is at stake for so many who call this country home. The Democratic National Committee will be key to ensuring Democrats come out strong during the midterms in 2018, and go on to win back the White House in 2020. We believe Keith is the right choice for revitalizing the party and determining which direction it will take in the years ahead. Thank you for joining us in supporting Keith Ellison as the next Chair of the Democratic National Committee.
